profile_basis.source: post-v58oy RCH linalg profile on clean origin/main 75ad31a6
profile_basis.rank: top non-B-pack linalg row after GEMM2048; GEMM exact-order B-pack lifetime route had just failed and was routed away

lever.description: Relax the private low-rank QR residual certificate margin from 0.5 to 1.0 so the certificate accepts exactly when unresolved residual energy is at or below the same squared singular-value cutoff used by the pseudoinverse.
lever.algorithmic_effect: For the profile-shaped 256x128 rank-4 matrix, stop the pivoted QR certificate at rank 4 instead of rank 11 before constructing the small pseudoinverse.

same_worker_gate.baseline_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64
same_worker_gate.candidate_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64

certificate_analysis.reason: The low-rank QR path already proves omitted residual energy against the same cutoff family used by the SVD pseudoinverse. The old 0.5 margin over-certified below-cutoff singular directions; 1.0 accepts at the cutoff boundary and still falls back when residual energy exceeds it.

isomorphism_proof: Public shape, dtype, output layout, rcond handling, non-finite handling, and fallback behavior are unchanged.
Pivoted modified-Gram-Schmidt order is unchanged: pivot scan remains left-to-right with strict greater-than swaps, preserving equal-residual tie behavior.
No RNG, parallel nondeterminism, FMA request, mixed precision, or public sorting/tie-breaking rule is introduced.
The only accepted fast-path cases are still finite m>=n matrices whose unresolved residual energy certificate proves omitted directions are below the pseudoinverse cutoff.
The locked profile-shaped output digest is aa6633cd1c02444eca8fa95d72870710cafc7dbc9503e9c4056640f3118d492f.

local.note: UBS embedded fmt, cargo check, clippy, and tests were clean; file-wide historical panic/indexing/unwrap inventory remains outside this lever.

next_route: Reprofile after landing; if GEMM exact-order B-pack remains dominant, route to a fundamentally different approved primitive rather than another B-pack lifetime tweak.
